mapper.insert: INSERT INTO topic_score_snapshot (topic_id, circle_id, score, rank_position, snapshot_time) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{circleId}, #{score}, #{rankPosition}, #{snapshotTime})

INSERT INTO topic_score_snapshot (topic_id, circle_id, score, rank_position, snapshot_time) VALUES
(#{item.topicId}, #{item.circleId}, #{item.score}, #{item.rankPosition}, #{item.snapshotTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, topic_id, circle_id, score, rank_position, snapshot_time, created_at FROM topic_score_snapshot WHERE snapshot_time = #{snapshotTime} ORDER BY rank_position ASC
SELECT id, topic_id, circle_id, score, rank_position, snapshot_time, created_at FROM topic_score_snapshot WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND snapshot_time = #{snapshotTime} ORDER BY rank_position ASC
